steps.title: Spot the example relationship
steps.content: The claim “The World Cup used to be much smaller and more limited geographically” is immediately supported by a specific historical detail: the 1934 event with only 16 teams, mostly from Europe and the Americas.

steps.title: Apply the transition
steps.content: ”For example” explicitly introduces a concrete instance that proves the general claim. “Indeed” only affirms; “though” inverts the relationship into a contrast; “moreover” treats them as equal parallel facts instead of claim-and-example. That matches choice C — C is correct.
